attributes.action: Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
attributes.additional_details: Prime Minister’s Questions are a key mechanism for democratic accountability, yet we believe questions are frequently deflected or unanswered, which undermines public confidence in Parliament and weakens scrutiny of the executive. We think that clear standards would improve transparency, restore trust, and ensure PMQs serve the public interest rather than political theatre.
attributes.background: Introduce clear standards for Prime Minister’s Questions requiring that answers address the substance of the question asked. Empower the Speaker to identify when questions have not been substantively answered and to request a follow-up response, either orally or in writing.
